auth.label: Bot API Token
auth.description: Botsonic bot API token sent with the X-BOT-KEY header. Open your Botsonic dashboard, select a bot, then copy the token from Integration Page > REST API as described at https://docs.botsonic.com/docs/rest-api.

actions.name: generate_response
actions.description: Generate one synchronous response from the connected Botsonic bot.

chat_id.description: The Botsonic chat identifier for this conversation.

source.description: Optional source value for Botsonic to refer to.

user_unique_identifier.description: Optional unique user identifier stored by Botsonic in the inbox.

id.description: Optional message identifier for this chat history item.

sent.description: Whether this chat history item was sent by the end user.

items.description: One source object returned by Botsonic.

sources.description: Sources attached to this chat history item.

items.description: One generated image URL or identifier.

generated_images.description: Generated image URLs attached to this chat history item.

items.description: One previous chat history message sent to Botsonic.

chat_history.description: Previous chat history for Botsonic to use as context.

response_type.description: The response format Botsonic should return.

chat_user_id.description: Existing Botsonic chat user identifier to link with old user data.

full_history.description: Whether Botsonic should return full chat history so far.

message_id.description: Existing message identifier used by Botsonic to resolve handoff.

timeout.description: Maximum number of seconds Botsonic should keep the connection open before timing out.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for generating one synchronous Botsonic response.

answer.description: The generated answer returned by Botsonic.

message_id.description: The Botsonic message identifier for the generated answer.

items.description: One source object returned by Botsonic.

sources.description: Sources returned by Botsonic for the answer.

sent.description: Whether this chat history item was sent by the end user.

items.description: One source object returned by Botsonic.

sources.description: Sources attached to this history item.

items.description: One generated image URL or identifier.

generated_images.description: Generated image URLs attached to this history item.

items.description: One chat history message returned by Botsonic.
One generated image URL or identifier.

generated_images.description: Generated image URLs returned by Botsonic.

items.description: One follow-up question.

human_handoff_status.description: Whether Botsonic reports a human handoff status.

items.description: One user option.

chat_ended.description: Whether Botsonic reports the chat has ended.

actions.name: get_conversation
actions.description: Get one Botsonic conversation by chat identifier.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching one Botsonic conversation.

_id.description: Optional internal Botsonic conversation document identifier.

bot_id.description: The Botsonic bot identifier attached to the conversation.

owner_id.description: The Botsonic owner identifier for the conversation.

ip_address.description: The IP address associated with the conversation.

num_messages.description: The number of messages in the conversation.

source.description: The conversation source returned by Botsonic.

is_resolved.description: Whether Botsonic reports the conversation as resolved.

oai_thread_id.description: The OpenAI thread identifier attached to the conversation.

additional_feedback.description: Additional feedback stored for this conversation.

message.description: The message text returned for this chat data entry.

items.description: One nested conversation message fragment.

messages.description: Nested message fragments returned by Botsonic.

sent.description: Whether this message was sent by the end user.

transcripted.description: Whether this message has been transcripted by Botsonic.

is_delivered.description: Whether Botsonic reports the message was delivered.

failed_reason.description: Failure reason returned by Botsonic for this message.

failed_data.description: Failure details returned by Botsonic for this message.

req_body.description: Request body details stored by Botsonic for this message.

run_id.description: Run identifier attached to this Botsonic message.

items.description: One source object returned by Botsonic.

like_status.description: Feedback status returned by Botsonic for this message.

resolution_status.description: Resolution status returned by Botsonic for this message.

is_via_live_agent.description: Whether this message was sent through a live agent.

created_at.description: The message creation timestamp returned by Botsonic.

items.description: One message object inside a Botsonic conversation.

chat_data.description: Messages and events stored in this conversation.

created_at.description: The conversation creation timestamp returned by Botsonic.

updated_at.description: The conversation last update timestamp returned by Botsonic.

outputSchema.description: One Botsonic conversation returned by the API.

actions.name: list_conversations
actions.description: List conversations for the connected Botsonic bot token.

search_query.description: Search query used to match Botsonic conversations.

updated_after.description: Filter conversations updated after this ISO 8601 timestamp.

updated_before.description: Filter conversations updated before this ISO 8601 timestamp.

page.description: The page number to request from Botsonic.

size.description: The number of conversations to request from Botsonic.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Botsonic conversations.

_id.description: Optional internal Botsonic conversation document identifier.

bot_id.description: The Botsonic bot identifier attached to the conversation.

owner_id.description: The Botsonic owner identifier for the conversation.

ip_address.description: The IP address associated with the conversation.

num_messages.description: The number of messages in the conversation.

source.description: The conversation source returned by Botsonic.

is_resolved.description: Whether Botsonic reports the conversation as resolved.

oai_thread_id.description: The OpenAI thread identifier attached to the conversation.

additional_feedback.description: Additional feedback stored for this conversation.

message.description: The message text returned for this chat data entry.

items.description: One nested conversation message fragment.

messages.description: Nested message fragments returned by Botsonic.

transcripted.description: Whether this message has been transcripted by Botsonic.

is_delivered.description: Whether Botsonic reports the message was delivered.

failed_reason.description: Failure reason returned by Botsonic for this message.

failed_data.description: Failure details returned by Botsonic for this message.

req_body.description: Request body details stored by Botsonic for this message.

run_id.description: Run identifier attached to this Botsonic message.

items.description: One source object returned by Botsonic.

like_status.description: Feedback status returned by Botsonic for this message.

resolution_status.description: Resolution status returned by Botsonic for this message.

is_via_live_agent.description: Whether this message was sent through a live agent.

created_at.description: The message creation timestamp returned by Botsonic.

items.description: One message object inside a Botsonic conversation.

chat_data.description: Messages and events stored in this conversation.

created_at.description: The conversation creation timestamp returned by Botsonic.

updated_at.description: The conversation last update timestamp returned by Botsonic.

items.description: One Botsonic conversation returned by the API.
The conversations returned by Botsonic.

total.description: The total number of matching records returned by Botsonic.

page.description: The current page number returned by Botsonic.

size.description: The current page size returned by Botsonic.

pages.description: The total number of pages returned by Botsonic.

outputSchema.description: The paginated Botsonic conversation list response.

actions.name: list_faqs
actions.description: List FAQs attached to the connected Botsonic bot token.

search_query.description: Search query used to match Botsonic FAQs.

sort_by.description: The FAQ attribute to sort by.

page.description: The page number to request from Botsonic.

size.description: The number of FAQs to request from Botsonic.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Botsonic FAQs.

bot_id.description: The Botsonic bot identifier attached to the FAQ.

error_reason.description: The error reason returned by Botsonic for failed FAQ processing.

status.description: The Botsonic processing status for the FAQ.

characters.description: The number of FAQ characters counted by Botsonic.

migration_status.description: The migration status returned by Botsonic for the FAQ.

created_at.description: The FAQ creation timestamp returned by Botsonic.

updated_at.description: The FAQ last update timestamp returned by Botsonic.

items.description: One Botsonic FAQ returned by the API.
The FAQs returned by Botsonic.

total.description: The total number of matching records returned by Botsonic.

page.description: The current page number returned by Botsonic.

size.description: The current page size returned by Botsonic.

pages.description: The total number of pages returned by Botsonic.

outputSchema.description: The paginated Botsonic FAQ list response.
